component-identifier.description: Unique identifier (e.g. CPE, purl, image digest). Example: cpe:2.3:a:nvidia:cudnn:9.1:*:*:*:*:*:*:*.

component-name.description: Name of compute/runtime component used by the AI system. Example: NVIDIA CUDA Runtime.

component-type.description: Type of component (hardware, runtime, container, accelerator). Example: runtime.

component-version.description: Version identifier for the component. Example: 12.4.

dependency-relationship.description: Relationship of this component to the AI system. Example: required-at-inference.

integrity-hash.description: Hash of immutable component artifact where applicable. Example: SHA-256 d4735e3a265e16eee03f59718b9b5d03.

supplier.description: Supplier or manufacturer of the compute component. Example: NVIDIA.

description: Runtime and compute dependency component for an AI SBOM. Reference: BSI, "SBOM for AI — minimum elements" (https://www.bsi.bund.de/SharedDocs/Downloads/EN/BSI/KI/SBOM-for-AI_minimum-elements.pdf?__blob=publicationFile&v=4).
name: ai-compute-component
